IRIS-HEP Monthly Meetings and Reviews

Not all of the below information is available without a password.

IRIS-HEP Areas

IRIS-HEP is composed of the following areas:

Area       Links       NSF Deep Dive Talks
Innovative Algorithms Info May 2019 - 18 Month Review - February 2021
Analysis Systems Info April, 2019 - 18 Month Review - November, 2020
Data Organization, Management, and Access (DOMA) Info July, 2019 - 18 Month Review - June, 2020 - April, 2021
Software Sustainability Core Info October, 2019 - 18 Month Review
Scalable Systems Laboratory Info August, 2019 - 18 Month Review - July, 2020
Open Science Grid (OSG-LHC) Info June, 2019 - 18 Month Review - March, 2021
Blueprint - September, 2019
Management/Planning - 18 Month Review - May, 2020 - July, 2020
